text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day before the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, preparations are complete! I cannot
wait to begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting ready, Agnes Tachyon exits the
dormitory and leaves for Kyoto Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Why, if it isn't Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you on the way to Kyoto Racecourse? If
memory serves, you're also running in the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Then, were you waiting for me? I wouldn't
mind heading there together.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, it's just a coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, please! I know you don't dislike me that much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You've even mentioned how I've been a role
model for your training.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What was it again? It was a while back now, but
didn't you compliment my running?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I just thought... you were running... a little
different than usual.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, it's slowly coming back to me! You
shouldn't have spilled the beans so easily!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Spill what beans?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your intuition was on point! It was true that my
philosophy towards running had changed at the
time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for dodging the question back
then. But I had my reasons...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hold on. I'm recalling... I had said something
about betting on the future you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, indeed. I'm not mistaken, then. Well... sorry
to say, but I'll have to retract my statement.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Instead of pinning my hopes on you, I'll use these
two legs of mine to keep moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Manhattan Cafe appears to loosen up a bit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Did I say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... I was just surprised... to hear you say that.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's all...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm? I see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, I should get going. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll leave in five minutes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. In that case, I'll be seeing you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe watches Agnes Tachyon walk off
into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Kyoto Racecourse is abuzz with
anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's Agnes Tachyon, the problem child, isn't it?
I hope nothing goes wrong today.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
According to the news, she's quite the character.
They say she's got talent, but...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's expectations are still low, huh? Makes
sense, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's bad reputation from the incident
at the Gekkei Hai still runs strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her supporters are few and far between. As for
her...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I noticed quite the commotion in the stands. It
seems I'm the talk of the town.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, that's not relevant now, is it? Instead...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We should focus on how to execute Plan A in
today's race! This event will directly affect both
our futures, bringing forth a new era of racing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Essentially, I'm going to give it my all today!
